heading: Definition
label: 20701 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2070136:1913., , .June 1, 1982Pub. L. 97–192, § 1496 Stat. 111The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2070136:1913., , .June 1, 1982Pub. L. 97–192, § 1496 Stat. 111The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
